manifest.title: The 2026 AI Playbook Everyone Is Using Right Now

block_map.text: In 2026, it feels like every serious team has adopted the same AI workflow, and it's often described as the obvious next step: add an assistant to writing, planning, and customer support, then measure the gains. People repeat the benefits confidently, but the details about when the evidence was produced and which conditions were tested are not always clear.

This year, the strongest teams supposedly moved from experimentation to full adoption, and many guides say the switch already happened across most industries. In practice, those statements depend heavily on sector, region, and regulatory context, but they are often presented as if they apply everywhere.
